subject: Hydraulics & Water Resources
question: A hydraulic jump is formed when

options.a: the two flows of supercritical velocities meet each other
options.b: the two flows of subcritical velocities meet each other
options.c: a supercritical flow strikes against a subcritical flow
options.d: a subcritical flow strikes against a supercritical flow

subject: Hydraulics & Water Resources
question: The rise, in water level, which occurs during the transformation of the unstable shooting flow to the stable streaming flow is called hydraulic jump.
